text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen nervously thinks of her family as
she vows to give the race everything she has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before she goes onto the track, she comes
face-to-face with Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two declare to give the race their all as
members of the Mejiro family.
